concierge.title: Friday — Finish Strong
notes: 🏆 RISE Challenge (Virginia) — Stability accepted! Complete the application
🎤 InnovateSouth deck — finish it, time the pitch (must be under 4 min), upload to Claude for evaluation & improvements
🧾 Review week finances: income, expenses, IRS set-aside
📱 TextOS: any user feedback or product notes to capture
🍺 End of week beer is earned — Barrel Proof or Cure

private: 🌹 Date night with Camille tonight — make it count
💌 She loves when you just handle the reservation without being asked
💌 Dress up a little — she notices

blocks.label: Friday — Finish Line
tips: Ship something before 3pm. Don't drift into the weekend.
One real deliverable. Then you're free.

blocks.label: Final Build Push
tips: Last hard coding block of the week
Leave Reyla in a clean state for Monday

blocks.label: Finance Review
tips: Weekly check: income logged, expenses noted, IRS set-aside?
Check the trailer title transfer status if pending

blocks.label: Lunch
tips: Friday lunch is a small reward — make it good
No-takeout if still in challenge window

blocks.label: Week Close
tips: Write your 3 wins. Commit and push any open code.
What moves to Monday? Write it down now.

blocks.label: Friday Wind-Down Drink
tips: You earned it. Barrel Proof or Cure.
Friday on Magazine Street has its own energy.

recommendation.name: Barrel Proof
recommendation.note: Best whiskey bar in the South. 5 minutes from home.
